# Runtime Fixture Milestone 26.1

```text
runtime_usability = verify(user_can_execute_runtime_verification, without_protocol_insider_context)
```

```text
verified_runtime != usable_runtime
```

The command is:

```text
clista runtime audit
```

Runtime usage audit confirms `clista runtime verify` is discoverable, clear, actionable, and bounded.

It does not prove runtime trust, protocol authority, governance approval, amendment approval, compatibility proof, trusted release status, or protocol authority.
